framework_context: The Regulated Friction Project documents a statistically significant correlation (r=0.6196, p=0.0004) between high-visibility friction events and institutional compliance events with a 7-day median lag. The Live Trackers monitor 7 active leverage nodes in real time to detect convergence windows. The dual-track model: Track A (foreign/geopolitical — information leverage) drives high-visibility friction that consumes attention, while Track B (domestic/structural — capital leverage) enables institutional restructuring during that attention capture.
